name: Three Onion Pie with Feta Cheese
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon fresh dill, chopped or 1 teaspoon dried dill
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the safflower oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped yellow onion and sauté for 5 minutes until translucent.
3. Stir in the quartered red onion and leeks (white parts), cooking another 15 minutes, stirring frequently, until onions are golden brown and leeks have softened.
4. Remove from heat.
5. Preheat oven to 350°F.
6. In a mixing bowl, combine the beaten egg with 2 tablespoons of chopped parsley, dill, tarragon, feta cheese, and pepper.
7. Stir in the onion mixture.
8. Oil a 10-inch tart pan and line the bottom generously with bread crumbs.
9. Pour in the onion mixture, arranging the tomato slice around the edge.
10. Sprinkle remaining chopped parsley in the center of the pie.
11. Sprinkle a light layer of bread crumbs over the top.
12. Bake for 40 to 45 minutes, or until the filling is set and golden on top.
13. Let stand for 5 to 10 minutes before cutting into wedges.
